raw_text:
Join us TONIGHT for our 
December PTA General Meeting! 
Wednesday, December 10th
8:00-9:00 PM ET via Zoom
Click to join meeting
We look forward to seeing you there!

Help Needed! Gift
Wrapping for the
Winter DriveWrap It Up
We’ve collected and sorted all the
donations--now we need to gift wrap
them and deliver to the schools!  
Kids who can help wrap are welcome
with an adult!
Saturday,
December 13 
10am-1pm
St Cloud All
Purpose Room
(Side door)
RSVP:
bit.ly/WrapItUp2025

Join the St. Cloud Elementary School PTA to
organize a family STEM festival this spring for our
community. We are need volunteers to help:
- Logistics and outreach
- Inclusive, hands-on family STEM activities
- Donations and sponsors 
All are welcome to volunteer - teachers,
parents/ caregivers, community members,
high school and college studentsVolunteers needed to help
bring our grant-funded
Family STEM Festival to life!
SIGN UP TO VOLUNTEER BY COMPLETING
THIS FORM BY 12.19.25 OR SCAN THIS
CODE 
Planning meetings for subcommittees will
begin in January and meet via Zoom.
Questions? Contact us at
grants@stcloudpta.org

Share Your
Family’s Story
Our Diversity Is Our Strength
Complete the Survey to
We’re looking to highlight and learn from the diversity in
our community--please tell us about YOUR family and
what YOU’D like to learn!
bit.ly/JaguarStories

DECEMBER REMINDERS
Holiday Bazaar
Saturday, December 6, 2025 
10am-2pm
All-purpose room through Door 5Bookfair December 2-6, 2025
NO School:  December 24-31st
Early Dismissal: December 23rd
PTA Meeting 
Join us and let your voice be heard  
December 10th

E

E
M
ENTARY SCHOOL
ST. CLOUD t o d a y
JOIN THE PTA for the 2025-26 school year and
make this a fantastic year for the Jaguars!G e t  y o u r  2 0 2 5 - 2 6
SCAN THE QR CODE TO LEARN MORE AND
JOIN THE PTA TODAY! PLEASE FEEL FREE
TO EMAIL MEMBERSHIP@STCLOUDPTA.ORG
WITH YOUR QUESTIONS.
PTA M EM BERSHIP
Volunteer 
OpportunitiesCultural Enrichment 
ProgramsYour $15 supports... 
Community EventsSchool AssembliesTeacher Appreciation
School Improvements
And you can be as involved
or uninvolved as you want!
bit.ly/scpta2526
